use std::sync::{Arc, Condvar, Mutex};

fn wait_for_ready(state: &Arc<(Mutex<bool>, Condvar)>) {
    let (lock, cvar) = &**state;
    let mut ready = lock.lock().unwrap();
    while !*ready {
        ready = cvar.wait(ready).unwrap();
    }
    println!("ready!");
}

fn wait_for_data(state: &Arc<(Mutex<Option<Data>>, Condvar)>) -> Data {
    let (lock, cvar) = &**state;
    let mut guard = lock.lock().unwrap();
    while guard.is_none() {
        guard = cvar.wait(guard).unwrap();
    }
    guard.take().unwrap()
}

struct Data;
